text.content: Catch us at the MAXAM Bassmaster Elite Series!

rich_text.plain_text: Catch us at the MAXAM Bassmaster Elite Series!

text.content:
Calling all anglers! The 2025 MAXAM Tire Bassmaster Elite at Sabine River in Orange, Texas, is set to take place from May 15–18, bringing world-class anglers and fishing enthusiasts together for four days of competition, camaraderie, and celebration of the sport. You can visit our team at our booth on site, so come on by for some goodies and cornhole!

Fans can enjoy live coverage of the MAXAM Tire Bassmaster Elite at Orange on Bassmaster.com and FOX Sports digital platforms starting Thursday, May 15. FS1 will also provide live broadcasts of the tournament leaders during the weekend’s competition.
